race.description: Become A Brc Member Qtis 2YO Colts And Geldings Mdn Plate
race.comment: Another one for the babies. SUBMARINE MISSION (12) has been right there in all three trials this campaign and jumps favourably from the inside marble. Sure to run well on debut. The well-bred PUNISHMENT DAY (11) (dam was a Listed winner) has looked handy at the trials and Rodd stays on top for race day. Respect any market moves. BULL RAYNER (2) is a recent trial winner who gets the services of gun hoop Thompson in the saddle. Bold run anticipated. NOZOMU (9) has the most race experience of this field and has shown some ability in all three runs to date. Wasn't too far away here when resuming and looks one for the multiples. BLACKSMITH (1) next in line.
